# kubefu_flux_image_toolkit_fluxcd_io_image_policy_v1alpha2 (Data Source)

ImagePolicy is the Schema for the imagepolicies API



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `metadata` (Map of String)
- `spec` (Map of String) ImagePolicySpec defines the parameters for calculating the ImagePolicy
- `status` (Map of String) ImagePolicyStatus defines the observed state of ImagePolicy

### Read-Only

- `api_version` (String) APIVersion defines the versioned schema of this representation of an object.
